title: Animal Style Protein Bowl
notes: Saved to revisit. ~451 cal, 43g protein per serving. The full recipe is in the creator's “Meal Prep Magic” digital cookbook (comment “cookbook” on the post for the link). Visible build: ground beef, diced potatoes, melted American cheese, caramelized onions, and an animal-style sauce on top.
notes_su: Disimpen kanggo dibukak maneh. ~451 kalori, 43g protein saben porsi. Resep lengkape ono nang buku masak digital “Meal Prep Magic” duwene sing nggawe (komentar “cookbook” nang postingane kanggo link). Sing katon: daging sapi giling, kentang dadu, keju Amerika leleh, bawang bombay karamel, ambek saus animal-style nang nduwure.
